# Governing Common-Pool Resources: A Reproducibility Note

**Authors:** Jane Q. Doe, John A. Smith

**Journal:** Journal of Reproducibility Studies, 2021

## Abstract

A short demo paper used in tests. It cites two real works in its references.

## References

1. Ostrom, E. (1990). *Governing the Commons*. Cambridge University Press.
2. Hardin, G. (1968). The tragedy of the commons. *Science*, 162(3859), 1243-1248.
